issues.title: Add support for Voyage embedding model
issues.body: Voyage ( [https://www.voyageai.com/](https://www.voyageai.com/) ) is a commercial model provider that specializes in embedding and re-rank models. When using Voyage's embedding + re-rank models, the hit rate in Chinese can reach up to 99% ([https://ihower.tw/blog/archives/12227](https://ihower.tw/blog/archives/12227)).

comments.body: Hi @kevintsai1202, Thanks for reporting and sorry about the delayed response. Would you be interested in contributing to add support for this via Spring AI Community [here](https://github.com/spring-ai-community)? You can submit a new feature request [here](https://github.com/spring-ai-community/community/issues/new?template=application.yml). Closing the issue for now.
